text: Jobs in postLLM world, what happened
voiceover: The job market has clearly changed. We are going to look at some of ways AI has altered the landscape and how to create a strategy to target some of the jobs in the market

text: All API programming have been impacted
voiceover: The depth of change has been underestimated, it was easy to ingnore at first since LLMs hallucinated frequently. They don't do that for sw coding tasks anymore.  The LLMs keep on getting better; as an example The attached github repo to the meetup demos for kubernetes up/down scaling has 0 code written by me. All of it was generated by chatGPT. This is the terraform code, it worked first time. No looking at error messages, no reading stack overflow posts. No verbose instructions for the llm. This wasnt the case. The LLMs keep on improving and every improvement leads to a dramitic increase in producitvity .SW with APIs, APIs have been turned into RL environments and this part of programming is now automated with verifiers to keep the policy on track.

code: def zip_tuples(tup1, tup2):\n    return [(a, b) for a, b in zip(tup1, tup2)]
title: Task 81: Incorrect - zip() truncates

code:
from itertools import cycle

def zip_tuples(tup1, tup2):
    if len(tup2) == 0: return []
    return [(a, b) for a, b in zip(tup1, cycle(tup2))]
title: Task 81: Fixed - use itertools.cycle
